> The diff coverage is `n/a`.

[![Impacted file tree graph](https://codecov.io/gh/coder/coder/pull/26/graphs/tree.svg?width=650&height=150&src=pr&token=TNLW3OAP6G&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=coder)](https://codecov.io/gh/coder/coder/pull/26?src=pr&el=tree&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=coder)

------

[Continue to review full report at Codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/coder/coder/pull/26?src=pr&el=continue&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=coder).
> **Legend** - [Click here to learn more](https://docs.codecov.io/docs/codecov-delta?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=coder)
> `Δ = absolute <relative> (impact)`, `ø = not affected`, `? = missing data`
> Powered by [Codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/coder/coder/pull/26?src=pr&el=footer&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=coder). Last update [423611b...30ea590](https://codecov.io/gh/coder/coder/pull/26?src=pr&el=lastupdated&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=coder). Read the [comment docs](https://docs.codecov.io/docs/pull-request-comments?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=coder).
Also looks like one we could backport to `cdr/m` as well to improve the test reliability there 🎉

Pushed 80b93e0 addressing the actionable findings from the deep review with the smallest reasonable diff.

**Resolved**

- P1 unbounded `downloadFileText` (C1) — bounded at the network boundary via `BufferedSource.request(maxBytes + 1)` + `readByteString(maxBytes)`, closes the body, default cap 1 MiB. `app/src/main/java/com/coder/android/data/repository/AgentChatRepository.kt`.
- P1 over-broad `isPlanTextFile` (C3) — dropped the bare `fileName.contains("plan")` substring branch, kept the safe mediaType and `.md`-extension paths.
- P2 unbounded `chatFileTextCache` + `mapLatest` cancellation (C2/C4) — cache is now `ConcurrentHashMap<UUID, Deferred<String>>` populated on the `appScope` via `computeIfAbsent { ... async { ... } }`, so `mapLatest` cancellation no longer kills the underlying HTTP fetch and concurrent callers dedupe on `fileId`.
- P2 pending-attachment matcher (C5) — captures the highest USER message id at send time as `pendingSendAfterId` and requires any attachment-only echo to be newer; historical attachment messages no longer clear the placeholder.
- P2 main-thread base64 decode in plan flow (C6) — wrapped the inline-data branch in `withContext(Dispatchers.Default)`.
- P3 `runCatching` swallowed `CancellationException` — rethrown explicitly in both VM call sites.
- P3 TalkBack drops attachment names for attachment-only USER rows — `description` builder now includes file/image names (or count) inside the merged-descendants surface.

**Deferred (out of scope for the smallest safe diff)**

- P2 SecureDevManager policy gap on `downloadFileText` — flagged to policy owner before merging; needs a product call on whether chat-file text counts as DLP-restricted workspace data.
- P3 `RemoteTextFilePreview` no retry affordance — UX follow-up, not in the bug's blast radius.
- P3 main-thread base64 decode in `FileAttachmentChip.decodeBase64Text` — same Compose-thread pattern as the plan flow but the chip is already capped at 1 MiB inline and gated by viewport; will pair with the duplication-cleanup follow-up.
- P3 `MarkdownRender` cacheKey collision on duplicate file names — small footgun; needs `cacheKey = part.fileId?.toString() ?: name` plumbed through `TextFilePreview`.
- P3 / Nit `FileHeader` and `decodeBase64Text` duplication, `hasFileAttachment` non-adoption in retry/UserMessage, generic chip layout — consolidation pass best done in its own PR.
- P4 `InlineImageAttachment` always renders an "Attachment" caption — cosmetic.

Validation:
- `JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64 ANDROID_HOME=/home/coder/android-sdk ./gradlew test -PskipVpnAar` passed.
- `./gradlew assembleDebug -PskipVpnAar` passed.

_This follow-up was generated by Coder Agents._
